name: Zoom Privileged Accounts on Personal Email Domains
description: Detects privileged zoom accounts tied to personal email domains.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.email AS email FROM zoom_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (LOWER(COALESCE(u.role_name, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role_name, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.role_name, '')) LIKE '%super%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.type, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.type, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.type, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.email, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com'
remediation: Migrate privileged accounts to corporate identity domains and remove personal-domain privileged access.
